task_title: Imperium Core Shape, Organ Life, Metrics, and Quarantine V0.1

language_and_encoding_policy.taskpack_internal_files: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM only. No Cyrillic in machine taskpack files.
language_and_encoding_policy.canonical_repo_artifacts: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM for schemas, JSON, machine receipts, validators, matrices, templates, and scripts.
language_and_encoding_policy.owner_facing_russian_runtime_output: Russian owner-facing summaries are allowed only through OFFICIO authority and final owner-facing reports.
language_and_encoding_policy.cyrillic_in_taskpack: FORBIDDEN except inside explicit OFFICIO-routed owner-facing artifacts, which are not included in this machine taskpack.
language_and_encoding_policy.localization_exception: OFFICIO_AGENTIS controls Russian owner-facing output. Machine artifacts remain ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM.

hard_scope_limits: No mass physical repository migration in this task.
No delete of legacy files in this task.
No import path rewrites in this task.
No active use of quarantine items unless explicit salvage receipt exists.
No Throne implementation. Throne is future laptop-only scope.
No fake green. Unknown evidence must be UNKNOWN_WITH_REASON.
expected_primary_outputs: schemas and templates for organ cards and life receipts
